description: "Returns display information and the calling user's current authentication status"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get end-user authentication status for a tool server."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/rest/api/v1/tool-servers/{serverId}/auth"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>

:::experimental

Expect changes and instability. Introduced on July 2, 2026. [Learn how experimental APIs work](/experimental/overview).

:::

Returns display information and the calling user's current authentication status
for the specified tool server.

</ParamsDetails>
